/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -flto=auto  -o _fideslib.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_fideslib.dir/bindings/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_fideslib.dir/cpp/native_helpers.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/fideslib/deps/openfhe-install/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/local/cuda-12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /root/fideslib/build/fideslib.a /root/fideslib/deps/openfhe-install/lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.4.2 /root/fideslib/deps/openfhe-install/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.4.2 /root/fideslib/deps/openfhe-install/lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.12.5 /usr/local/cuda-12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnccl.so -fopenmp -ldl /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a
